installCommand: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/yutna/nextjs-template my-app && cd my-app && npm install && npm run dev
subtitle: A production-ready Next.js 16 template built for the vibe coding era. Turn your prompts into products — server-first, type-safe, and GitHub Copilot-ready.
title:
Vibe Coding
From Prompt to IPO
